title: 90PCS Wooden Dowel Pins Kit for DIY, Genuine Imperial Diameters 1/4, 5/16, 3/8 inch Wood Dowels for Furniture Repair, Woodworking
features: Imperial Diameters: These wood dowels have genuine imperial sizes, fitting perfectly with 1/4", 5/16" and 3/8" imperial-standard drill bits, with no approximate metric equivalents. These three sizes are also common standards for furniture dowels, each corresponding to a different length: 3/8" × 1 31/32", 5/16" × 1 9/16", and 1/4" × 1 3/16"

90 Pieces Total: This wooden dowel set includes 90 pieces, meeting the needs of daily DIY crafts and furniture repairs. The breakdown is as follows: 3/8 x 1-31/32 inch (14PCS), 5/16 x 1-9/16 inch (31PCS), and 1/4 x 1-3/16 inch (45PCS). We also include a large transparent plastic case for easy storage of leftover dowels, keeping them handy for future use

Easy to install: Our wooden dowels feature beveled edges and chamfers at the ends for easy insertion into holes. The dowels also have a grooved surface that allows wood glue to flow and penetrate all areas of the dowel, ensuring stronger, more secure installation

Sturdy and durable: Crafted from hardwood, our dowels are extremely sturdy and durable, with a smooth, bright surface free of burrs and knots. Their grooves are also highly uniform and neat, boasting accurate sizing. And works for both small and large furniture

Versatile Applications: These wood dowels are ideal for DIY furniture repair projects, such as desks, shoe racks, chairs, dining tables, kitchen cabinets, wine racks, nightstands, and bed frames. Perfect for DIY enthusiasts, they offer wide-ranging use
description: Product Features： 1. Genuine imperial diameter, size matches drill bit diameter perfectly. Our wood dowel set includes 3 common diameters: 1/4, 5/16, 3/8 inch. Manufactured to standard imperial drill sizes (not metric 6, 8, 10mm), they perfectly match 1/4, 5/16, 3/8 inch drills. Friendly reminder: Due to the natural tendency of wood to expand and contract with environmental changes, slight deviations from the labeled dimensions are normal. 2. Every wooden dowel has chamfered ends for simple installation. 3. Surface groove design ensures better glue bonding and a tighter fit during installation. Uniform grooves on the wood dowel let glue penetrate all areas, ensuring full contact with the hole for a more secure install. 4. Crafted from hard wood for sturdiness and durability. Widely applicable: Perfect for woodworking and DIY enthusiasts, it works great for furniture repairs. What you Get： Includes 90 wooden dowels total： 3/8 x 1-31/32 inch ：14PCS 5/16 x 1-9/16 inch ：31PCS 1/4 x 1-3/16 inch ：45PCS Also comes with a clear plastic box to store leftover dowels.
